name: Student Fee Collection Report
query:
SELECT
 student as "Student:Link/Student:200",
 student.student_name as "Student Name:Data:150",
 sum(grand_total) - sum(outstanding_amount) as "Paid Amount:Currency:150",
 sum(outstanding_amount) as "Outstanding Amount:Currency:150",
 sum(grand_total) as "Grand Total:Currency:150"
FROM
 `tabSales Invoice`
JOIN
 `tabStudent` as student
ON
 student.name = `tabSales Invoice`.student
WHERE
 `tabSales Invoice`.docstatus=1
AND
 `tabSales Invoice`.student IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
 `tabSales Invoice`.student
